game_name: Tom & Jerry: The Ultimate Game of Cat and Mouse!
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Tom & Jerry (NES) wiki page
notes: Documentation from TCRF covers unused graphics (heart variants for fractional damage) and unused items (jam jar, egg, soap, fly-swatter, frying pan, bug sprayer, gold key, fuse) with their animation types (throwing, swinging), but does not contain specific sprite dimensions, color palette counts, tile sizes, or animation frame counts. Game features 5 stages with regional differences in difficulty and health restoration mechanics.
